chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1289 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 07-11-2023 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Sahito, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Akhtiar Ahmed Hisbani, Advocate for Respondent No.5 Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the respondent No.5 submits that the remaining amount of rupees four lacs and some thousands on account of pensionary benefits will be paid to the petitioner within two months. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly is disposed of. However, default in payment would expose the defaulter to contempt proceedings. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
